ENV_FILE="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/todo-list-with-Azure-backend/env/.env.dev.user"

if [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then
  echo "SQL_ENDPOINT='vscuse-test-sql.database.windows.net'" >> "$ENV_FILE"
  echo "SQL_DATABASE_NAME='vscuse-test-db'" >> "$ENV_FILE"
  echo "SQL_USER_NAME='${{secret:SQL_USER:}}'" >> "$ENV_FILE"
  echo "SQL_PASSWORD='${{secret:SECRET_SQL_PASSWORD:}}'" >> "$ENV_FILE"
  echo "Successfully updated $ENV_FILE"
else
  echo "File not found: $ENV_FILE" >&2
  exit 1
fi
